Work History

12 Months of Real-World AI

AI/ML Engineer Intern
CTTC MSME · Bhubaneswar, India
Computer Vision · Deployment
  • Built a real-time facial recognition attendance system from scratch using CNN, TensorFlow, Keras, and OpenCV — capturing live video, auto-identifying individuals, and logging attendance to MySQL, eliminating manual entry entirely.
  • Developed object detection pipelines on custom-labelled datasets using transfer learning with pre-trained CNN architectures and data augmentation strategies to improve generalisation and reduce overfitting.
  • Owned the complete model lifecycle independently: raw data preprocessing, feature engineering, architecture selection, training, hyperparameter tuning, and evaluation (precision, recall, F1-score).
  • Integrated trained deep learning models into desktop applications for live operational workflows as part of a cross-functional team, bridging research and real-world deployment.
  • The facial recognition system was adopted for actual operational use within the internship period.
AI/ML Engineer Intern
1stop.ai · Remote
NLP · Image Classification
  • Designed and trained a multi-class NLP text classification model using tokenisation, TF-IDF vectorisation, word embeddings, and a deep neural network — trained on Kaggle datasets with strong multi-class accuracy.
  • Built a landmark detection and image classification system end-to-end using CNN architectures in TensorFlow and Keras, from raw data ingestion through training, evaluation, and inference.
  • Managed the full ML pipeline independently for every project: data sourcing, cleaning, preprocessing, model design, training runs, evaluation, and technical documentation for handover.
  • Improved model performance across projects through regularisation techniques — dropout layers, batch normalisation, early stopping — consistently closing the training-validation gap.
Key Projects

Systems That Work in Production

01
Facial Recognition Attendance System

End-to-end real-time pipeline: live video → Haar Cascade face detection → CNN-based identification → automatic MySQL timestamp logging. Data augmentation (rotation, brightness, flipping) ensured reliable performance under varied lighting and angles. Adopted for live operations at CTTC MSME.

CNNTensorFlowKeras OpenCVMySQLHaar Cascade
02
NLP Multi-Class Text Classification Pipeline

Complete NLP pipeline: raw text cleaning → tokenisation → stop-word removal → TF-IDF feature extraction → word embedding generation → deep neural network classifier with dropout and early stopping. Evaluated on accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score across all classes. Fully documented for reproducibility.

NLPTF-IDFWord Embeddings Deep Neural NetworkKaggle
03
Landmark Detection & Image Classification

Built an end-to-end image classification system using CNN architectures in TensorFlow and Keras — from raw data ingestion and preprocessing through to training, evaluation, and inference. Applied data augmentation and regularisation for production-grade generalisation.

CNNTensorFlowTransfer Learning Data AugmentationBatch Normalisation
